info.title: crank-azdo
info.description: Execute crank jobs added to an Azure Service Bus queue by Azure DevOps.

options.name: --connection-string
options.description: The Azure Service Bus connection string. Can be an environment variable name.

options.name: --queue
options.description: The Azure Service Bus queue name. Can be an environment variable name.

options.name: --cert-client-id
options.description: Client id for service principal used as part of cert based auth.

options.name: --cert-tenant-id
options.description: Tenant id for service principal used as part of cert based auth.

options.name: --cert-thumbprint
options.description: Thumbprint of the certificate being used.

options.name: --cert-pwd
options.description: Password of the certificate to be used for auth.

options.name: --cert-sni
options.description: Enable subject name / issuer based authentication (SNI).
